feature: On-site LLM chat (Claude Sonnet) + budget management + downloadable ballot + voter profile
rationale: Phase 5 introduces server-side runtime (API routes), budget tracking, and two converging user paths (chat + copy-paste). Expected: chat UI, chat server route, budget tracker, ballot/profile generation, voter profile schema. Adjacent: components that need to support both paths (ZipForm, PromptOutput), prompt generator extensions. NOT expected: i18n changes (Phase 4 should have settled that), data-access layer changes (Phase 3), additional translations.
